"D:\IDE\CLion\CLion 2021.3.2\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\STL.dir/objects.a
"D:\IDE\CLion\CLion 2021.3.2\bin\mingw\bin\ar.exe" qc CMakeFiles\STL.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\STL.dir\objects1.rsp
"D:\IDE\CLion\CLion 2021.3.2\bin\mingw\bin\g++.exe" -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\STL.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o STL.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libSTL.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\STL.dir\linklibs.rsp
